feed.title: SAP Community - Software Logistics
feed.subtitle: Software Logistics Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP system Installation on Oracle database with SWPM in unattended mode
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

I am trying to perform a silent SAP install on Oracle DB.

Per OSS note 2506859, have tried updating redo logs in input file to get created under +OLOG/+RECO ASM diskgroups.

However, the installation still creates the online redo logs under +DATA which is the default ASM diskgroup.

# Oracle mirrlog drive.

ora.mirrlogDrive =

# Oracle origlog drive. ora.origlogDrive =

Has anyone come across this error before?

entry.title: SAPCAR and it's version numbering
entry.content:
Hello,

i have downloaded today the latest version of SAPCAR for Linux. Which is SAPCAR_1115-70006178.EXE

In my software folder, i have a lot of different versions of SAPCAR from some years ago, and there i have a version from August 2020 which is
SAPCAR_1320-80000935.EXE

So, why is the actual version lower then the version some years ago? Can someone explain me the versioning logic?

Thank you.

entry.title: How to Obtain Objects from other Systems / Repair damaged ones?
entry.content:
Hello,

i have the Problem that a SUM run stops with an error, that is triggered by an broken or corrupted RASUVAR1.

The proposed solution is to put all affected Objects (SAPLASU5, LASU5U01, FASU_HANDLE_REPORT_RFC, FASU_START, FASU_FINISH) into a transport and import it into the problematic System.

The biggest Problem i have is, that this requires a System on the same release Level as my System has when starting the SUM (1909 SP01), that is the "organ Donor" if you will

would there be other solutions in order to Repair Broken objects, that do not require other Systems to do so?

and even if i had a System, how would i proceed? Create a transport, put all the Objects in, release it and then Copy the Co and Data files from one System to another?

Thank you very much for your Support!

Alessandro

entry.title: Support Pack upgrade
entry.content:
Dear Experts & Friends,

We have upgraded our support pack from SP12 to SP26.

But in system, it is showing SP22.

In my opinion, it should be,0026 no ?

Please correct me If I am wrong & pass your expert comments to guide me.

Regards,

Radheshyam P.

entry.title: Production URL in Message Processing Logs ODATA API
entry.content:
Hello expert,

My Integration suite is running on cloud foundry.

I want to customize CPI logs using Message API Logs in API Business HUB , https://api.sap.com/api/MessageProcessingLogs/overview.

The url composed of "Account Short Name", "SSL Host" and other region information.

I wonder how to find my integration suite production url to customize cpi logs.

Thanks advance.

entry.title: Re-distributor license
entry.content:
We are a software house looking to use Crystal Reports as part of our EPOS system. So we are looking to distribute Crystal Reports in the reporting section. I have 2 questions

1 Do we need to buy a distributors license for re-distribution?

2 What Crystal software would we need to install on the end users PC's other than the RPT files themselves?

entry.title: SM20 Audit logs not displaying for 6 months
entry.content:
SM20 audit logs whenever I want to have the data of 6 months it's not showing full data for 6 months.
Before it was showing only one day data, So we tried with new profile and activated it now its showing the data from which we have activated the new profile not the previous data.

Thanks & Regard,

Mohammad Ali

entry.title: Where is my license?
entry.content: I was using the trial version of Crystal Reports 2020 and on day 25, i bought the software. Where do i get the new license key? It never came in an email or anything. Thanks.

entry.title: Question supplement for 289856 Automatic invoice verification（MIRO） through IDOC
entry.content:
screenshot.pngHello consultant,

I create a new one because the incident 289856 has been closed.

The consultant Min has already provided a reply to me, but still have a question need to be confirmed. Attached the details.

At the end of the reply, Min described that "Document 1500000006 was posted in company code NTY". I want to know can it only be generated accounting document directly through IDOC? Can it be generated invoice document firstly just like executing MIRO invoice verification?

Thanks.

Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards,

Wenwen

entry.title: SAP developer license
entry.content:
Hi All,

For an SAP ECC development instance with a 28 day temporary license, is it possible to get a developer license? while waiting to have a definitive license.

Best Regards,

Hassan

entry.title: Sql Anywhere 5 driver dowload
entry.content: Where can i dowload the Sql Anywhere 5 driver for Windows?

entry.title: Business Function - Is it better to activate BFs manually or activate using transport?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone.

We are currently doing an SLP implementation using Ariba CIG.

In the configuration, we have to activate a few Business Functions (SFW5) to be able to use the transaction code (DRFOUT and DRFIMG).

However, we would like to know what's the best practice and the difference between

1. Activating the Business Functions in DEV / QA / PROD manually

2. Transport the activated business functions from DEV system to next system

Activated Business Functions in SFW5: *see attached*

business-functions.png

entry.title: SAP version supports NOTE issues
entry.content: For example, if a NOTE display support version is to APPL 605, does APPL606 include or support the scheme or functionality for that note?

entry.title: Choosing the Right Automation Testing Tool for Mobile App Development
entry.content:
Hello fellow developers and testers,

I'm currently working on a mobile app development software project, and I'm in the process of selecting an automation testing tool software to streamline the testing process. There are so many options out there, and I'm a bit overwhelmed by the choices.

I'd love to hear from those of you with experience in this field. Can you please share your insights on the following:

  1. Which automation testing tools have you used for mobile app testing, and what were your experiences with them? Are there any standout features or limitations you'd like to highlight?

  2. What factors should I consider when choosing an automation testing tool for mobile apps? Are there specific criteria or best practices you follow when making this decision?

  3. Are there any open-source automation testing tools that you would recommend for mobile app testing? I'm interested in exploring both open-source and commercial options.

  4. Do you have any tips or resources for someone who is new to automation testing but wants to get started in mobile app testing efficiently?

Your insights will be greatly appreciated, as they will help me and others in the community make more informed decisions when it comes to automation testing tools for mobile app development. Thanks in advance for your input!

entry.title: Cannot open '/usr/sap//SYS/exe/uc/linuxx86_64/instance.lst': No such file or directory
entry.content:
Severe error(s) occurred in phase PREP_INPUT_CHECK/KX_CPYORG!

Last error code set:

Cannot open '/usr/sap/<SID>/SYS/exe/uc/linuxx86_64/instance.lst': No such file or

directory

Trouble Ticket Generation

A trouble ticket and an archive with all relevant log files have been generated.

Trouble ticket: "/usr/sap/install_<SID>/SUM/abap/log/SAPup_troubleticket.log"

Log archive: "/usr/sap/install_<SID>/SUM/abap/log/SAPup_troubleticket_logs.sar"

entry.title: Unattended Mode - Up-to-date installation possible ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I plan to use the unattended mode of SWPM to install SAP Solution Manager 7.2.

I have a question regarding the installation process

Can I install an up-to-date system by using a stack.xml file generated by the Maintenance Planner to install the latest Support Package Stack? If this is possible, how can it be achieved? Do I simply need to include the SAPINST_STACK_XML option during the execution of SWPM, and will SWPM automatically invoke the SUM during the installation process?

entry.title: SUM not detecting the additinal app instance
entry.content:
we are on the process of ecc to s4hana conversion , we have central app instance in windows os and one additional app on linux os , in sum phase sum not detecting the  additional app instance on linux os
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Client export Ended with errors : error code 0006 ( Scrap Data )
entry.content:
We are working on doing client copy from production to Dev. Following Client Export and import methodology. 

During the Prod export process, we have encountered the following error in the log file:

 Transport control program tp ended with error code 0006
 Error exporting request TUPKT00033 01:12:38
 Program ended with error or warning, return code: F

 

2WETW206 scrap char 0x0000 found in RFRR.SRTFD. See note 718511 for details.
3WETW000 (SAP K04C�������� ################                           ). Entry "300RRSAP K04C�������� ################                           ###" not exported.
2WETW206 scrap char in NUMC field found in T512E.LFDNR. See note 718511 for details.
3WETW000   ). Entry "30007KK01/101RT     " not exported.

 

2WETW206 scrap char in NUMC field found in T884H.CODE.



The below SAP note says it is ok to use this export TR file and import in Dev system: Wanted to check what SAPs recommendation is? 
718511 - R3trans: Export error due to "scrap characters" 

Attaching the log file to the case. 
Also only 1 TR which got generated : TUPKT00033
The below TR is not generated during this export process
TUPKX00033" for transporting client-specific texts, provided texts are available in this client


System is open and the credentials are maintained in the secure area. 

Thanks,
Neeraj

entry.title: How to automatically retrieve the tax code on the item from the material master?
entry.content:
Hey,

I need to have a taxe code from MM so there's a way to automatically retrieve the tax code on the item from the material master

entry.title: After implementing SAP Note 3395784, Error 8 on TOC Create In ChaRM. Mismatched parameters in FM
entry.content: After implementing SAP Note 3395784, Error 8 on TOC Create In ChaRM. Mismatched parameters in FM CHANGEDOCUMENT_READ_ALL
